article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.2.1. 14792. Burnaby Zoning Bylaw 1965 Amendment  No. 2, 2026 New Zoning Districts final (3 and FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Amendment Would Create New Employment, Industrial, and Agricultural Districts
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a major update to Burnaby's Zoning Bylaw that would create new land-use zones — including Employment (E1), Industrial (I1), Interim Parks (PM1), Interim Institutional (PM2), and Interim Agricultural (AM1) districts — and update dozens of definitions for permitted uses like light industrial, agriculture, and supportive housing.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business property could be affected by the new E1, I1, PM1, PM2, or AM1 zoning districts.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Bylaw Amendment No. 2, 2026 — third reading scheduled

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Agriculture, Landlord & Property Mgmt
